zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bathe於大約1460年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯時，她的父親Bartholomew Bathe II42歲，母親Catherine Uriel34歲。她於1477年與Sir James Dillon在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯紐托 特利姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在她的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bathe于大约1460年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯时，她的父亲Bartholomew Bathe II42岁，母亲Catherine Uriel34岁。她于1477年与Sir James Dillon在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯紐托 特利姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在她的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bathe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire): habitational name from the city of Bath (see   Bath   1) or from Bathe Barton in Devon, which is named with the same word.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the element badu ‘battle’.

variants.name: Bath
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dalbir, Renu, Sandeep, Suneet, Tarlok, Vikram.

English (southern): habitational name from the city of Bath in Somerset, or possibly from Bathe Barton in North Tawton in Devon, or some other minor places so called. The city of Bath is the site of the sumptuous, but in the Middle Ages ruined, Roman baths. The place is named with the dative plural of Old English bæth ‘bath’. In some cases the surname may have originated as a metonymic occupational name for an attendant at a public bath house.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bathe was born about 1460, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, her father, Bartholomew Bathe II, was 42 and her mother, Catherine Uriel, was 34. She married Sir James Dillon in 1477, in Newtown Trim, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1540, in her hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bathe est née environ 1460, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, son père, Bartholomew Bathe II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Catherine Uriel, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Dillon en 1477, à Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bathe um 1460 in Diocese of Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew Bathe II 42 und ihre Mutter Catherine Uriel 34. Sie hat 1477 in Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irland Sir James Dillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 81 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bathe è nata il circa 1460 nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Bartholomew Bathe II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Catherine Uriel, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Dillon nel 1477, nel Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Batheが約1460年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Bathe IIは42歳，母Catherine Urielは34歳であった。1477年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスニュートウン トリムでSir James Dillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bathe(이)가 대략 1460년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Bathe II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Uriel(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1477년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 뉴타운 트림에서 Sir James Dillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 그녀의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bathe nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Bartholomew Bathe II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Uriel, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Dillon em 1477, em Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bathe родилась около 1460 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Bathe II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Uriel, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Dillon в 1477 г. в местности нютоун трим, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bathe nació aproximadamente 1460, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Bartholomew Bathe II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Catherine Uriel, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir James Dillon en 1477, en Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
